steps.title: Build a two-row table
steps.content: Use slope-intercept form $f(x)=mx+b$. The point $(0,7)$ is the $y$-intercept, so $b=7$. The slope is $m=\frac{1}{3}$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The fitted line has slope $\frac{1}{3}$ and intercept $7$, so $f(x)=\frac{1}{3}x+7$. The distractors use intercepts $\frac{1}{7}$, $-\frac{7}{3}$, or $-7$ instead of $7$. A is correct.
